title: Task Sidecar
description: Structured metadata for a task definition, stored alongside the .md file

type.description: Whether this is a Red (test-first) or Green (implementation) task

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task

feature_gates.description: Feature gate file paths this task creates (green) or tests against (red)

requirement_mappings.description: Requirement IDs this task helps fulfill
